content: Store listing assets (learn.microsoft.com/partner-center/marketplace-offers/create-effective-office-store-listings): task pane/content add-in icon must be 32x32 (IconUrl), high-DPI variant 64x64 (HighResolutionIconUrl) -- Outlook add-ins use 64x64/128x128 instead. >=1 screenshot required. Name max 50 chars (rec 30), Summary max 100 chars (rec 70), Description max 10,000 chars (rec 300-500 words).
